name: Bug Fixes (unofficial patch set)
author: neostryder (RPGM Tools)
description: Bundled, opt-in fixes for upstream Angband 4.2.6 bugs, in the model of an unofficial patch. Every fix is a named toggle in the in-app Fixes & tweaks menu and is OFF by default; core stays faithful to 4.2.6 (bugs included) unless you turn a fix on. See docs/modding/BUG_FIXES.md for the upstream issue/PR/commit each cites.

rules.title: No duplicate unique kills in history (#4245)
rules.description: A unique reached again through a shape-change or projection death path no longer logs a second 'Killed X' entry in your character history.

rules.title: Save noise and scent trails (#4605)
rules.description: Persists the noise and scent heatmaps in the save, so monsters track you identically after a save/reload as they would have without one.

rules.title: Strict object-list ordering (#4664)
rules.description: Gives the floor object list a deterministic total order (a geometric tiebreak after distance), so equal-distance items never reorder unexpectedly.

rules.title: Prevent duplicate artifacts (#4510)
rules.description: Adds a defensive re-check so an object already carrying a created artifact can never be committed as that artifact a second time.
